steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Verify: transaction page table has data
Select Card type 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: all entries in the 'Card type' column match the selected filter
